title: notifications-in-app — published events
description: Events fired by the in-app transport. The base `notifications` module publishes the core lifecycle events (NotificationDispatched, NotificationDelivered, NotificationFailed) — those are the primary observability surface. This module publishes only in-app-specific reactions.

events.name: InAppDeliveryBroadcast
events.trigger: InAppTransport::send() finished writing the delivery row + queued the WebSocket broadcast. Fires exactly once per (tenant, user, notification).

events.name: InAppDeliveryRead
events.trigger: A NotificationDelivery.read_at was set from null. Fires exactly once per delivery (idempotent). NOT fired on subsequent mark-read attempts.

events.name: InAppDeliveryDismissed
events.trigger: User clicked dismiss on the bell UI. Sets dismissed_at + fires event once. Distinct from InAppDeliveryRead — a delivery can be read (viewed in a modal) without being dismissed (still visible in the drawer).

events.name: InAppBulkMarkAllRead
events.trigger: Bulk mark-all-read operation completed for a caller. Emitted from BulkMarkReadJob on job success — the read events themselves are batched-suppressed (would generate N events for N deliveries; that's noise).
